description.zh-cn: 预约/服务下单：为服务类商品配置可预约时段、单时段容量与营业时间，会员在前台选择日期时段提交预约，后台审核确认/完成/取消，支持容量校验防超约。
description.en: Booking/appointments: configure bookable time slots, per-slot capacity and business hours for service products; members pick a date/time to book; admin confirms/completes/cancels with capacity checks to prevent overbooking.
